creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@asiaasiauae has a new restaurant in Business Bay, and it’s a lovely venue for date nights! 💕

What we love:
❤️ Fancy and artsy interiors! You can dine indoor under the cherry blossoms or al fresco with fabulous views of Dubai Canal.
🥘 Upscale Pan-Asian cuisine. Our foodie highlights are Truffle Bluefin Tuna Maki for starters, Miso Black Cod for main course, and Yuzu Tart for dessert.
🍹 Unique cocktails! Must-try is the Tsurai; a fruity and spicy concoction.
👫🏻 Warm and attentive staff.

💵 Approximate bill for 2: 300 AED onwards.

📍Asia Asia, Grand Millennium Hotel Business Bay
